violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the kitchen have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2025
